note: Footprint provenance: 'kicad-official' files are from KiCad 7.0.11 official libraries (Ubuntu archive package — the GitHub mirrors KiCad/kicad-footprints and KiCad/kicad-symbols are stale 2020 snapshots because KiCad development moved to GitLab, which is unreachable from this environment); 'espressif' from github.com/espressif/kicad-libraries (shallow clone). SnapEDA/easyeda2kicad/vendor portals blocked -> TO-GENERATE list is deliberate and substantial. | Stage-2: 18 TO-GENERATE closed — 16 parametric E0 footprints in library/footprints/generated/ (gen_footprints.py;per-file header carries dim source + overlay-verify rule) and 2 remapped to official (ADS131M04 -> generic QFN-20, camera FPC -> Hirose FH12-24). Extra officials harvested: WSON-14 (LMP91000), MSOP-8 (OPA381), FH12-13/24 FPC, Antenova SR4G013 GNSS antenna. | H2.5 (2026-07-12): 9 footprints promoted to generated-E1 from real vendor land patterns (TCS3448, AS7421, MLX90632->SFN5, MLX90642->custom TO39, ENS161 3x3 grid, AS7058 named-grid, MIA-M10Q M-LGA53, TPS22916 named balls, BQ25620 WQFN18-RYK replacing wrong RTE16); symbols remapped to real pins for BQ27427/TPS62840/TPS62823/TLV62568/DRV2605L/IQS7222A/BQ29700/CYPD3177. | H2.5 round 3 (2026-07-12): SGX-4CO footprint -> E1 (real 13.5 PCD pin circle, socket receptacles, DS-0138 Issue 3); BL54L15 -> E1 (real 39-pad LGA land pattern + antenna keep-out, EZ-DS v1.9); LMP91000 symbol renumbered to real WSON-14 pins (SNAS506I p3); BL54L15 symbol renumbered to real module pads (EZ-DS v1.9 Table 1).
symbol_note: All non-generic symbols are SKiDL programmatic templates in boards/v1/circuit/lib_parts.py (tier E0 pin maps).

parts.verify_notes: VERIFIED-DS MLX90642 DS rev003 p31 Fig 34: TO-39 with pin circle O5.84 and 45-deg-paired leads — generic TO-39-4 (90deg, O5.08) did NOT fit; custom footprint generated. Pin map p4 (1 SDA/2 VDD/3 GND/4 SCL, model 2/3 swap fixed); default addr 0x66 (p16).

Pad names + REAL land geometry now from the CH-specific DS14310 Rev 9: Fig 30 p33 (pads 0.5x0.515 @0.75 non-cumulative, rows +/-1.0575, B1/B7 0.535x0.5 @+/-2.57, B4 thermal 2.316x1.2 -> GND per AN5897); pin map re-verified identical to the CX anchor (Table 3 p7). Land drawn 1:1 -- AN5897 land pattern not staged, overlay-verify at H3. ECO-H3: IOVDD is 1.2/1.8V only (re-confirmed).

VERIFIED-DS TCS3448 DS001121 p51 Fig 11: pads 0.488x0.575, pitch 0.8, row c-c 1.276; body 3.1x2.0 p5. Addr 0x59 (p19) — 0x39 anchor refuted; moved to I2C-A; 1.8V-only VDD/SCL/SDA (p9) — H3 level-shift ECO.
OLGA16 3.65x2.61 per AS7331 DS p65 (drawing is image -> pad grid E0-estimated). Addr 0x74 VERIFIED-DS p43.

VERIFIED-DS AS7421 DS000667 p45-46: OLGA10 is 6.6x6.0 (old 3.5x3.5 guess replaced); 2x5 pads 0.6x0.5 @1.25 rows +/-2.6, 2 center EPs (GND/LEDA). Addr 0x64 (p23). 4 NIR LEDs are INTEGRATED (p10/p20) — external LED chain deleted.

VERIFIED-DS MLX90632 DS rev13 p47 Fig 26: 5 pads 0.30x0.25 @0.5 single column + 2.10x2.55 thermal (8x0.2 PTH); body 3.0 (p46). ADDR pin added to symbol (GND -> 0x3A, p10). Order -000 = 3.3V I2C level.
Official Hirose FH12 24p 0.5mm FPC (DNP in v1); camera module is off-board.
Official BME680 LGA-8 3x3; BME688 is same package — verify pad map vs BST-BME688-DS000.
DFN-6 2.44x2.44 pitch 0.8 + GND die pad — SGP41 DS p18 (staged). Addr 0x59 VERIFIED-DS p12.
VERIFIED-DS ENS161 DS v1.1 p41 Table 40: LGA-9 is a 3x3 GRID (pitch 1.05, lead 0.7 sq, land +0.05) — U-perimeter placeholder replaced. Pin map p5; addr 0x53 ADDR-high confirmed; VDD 1.71-1.98V.
Official SCD4x footprint — direct match. VERIFIED-DS SCD4x DS p9: I2C 0x62 confirmed.
Official SHT4x footprint — direct match. VERIFIED-DS SHT4x DS v7.1 p2: 0x44 requires the SHT41-AD1B ordering code.
Host side is Molex 503566-1302 ZIF 13ckt 0.3mm — BMV080 DS p16 (staged). Addr 0x57 + PS/CSB/MISO straps VERIFIED-DS p26/p32.
Official Maxim OLGA-14 (MAX3010x package) — verify glass window keepout. 1.8V core / 3V3 bus tolerance VERIFY.
GRID VERIFIED (short DS DS001085 p9): A1..G6 named balls @0.4, die 2.545x2.815. Ball-SIGNAL map + I2C addr still open — full DS DS001573 is NDA-gated, FAE contact queued.
REAL 50-ball named map from A121 DS v1.8 p8-9 (staged); 5.5x5.2 0.5mm pitch. Rails VERIFIED-DS p10: VRX/VTX/VDIG 1.8V-only (ECO-H3); SPI 50MHz mode 0 p17. AiP antenna keepout above.
Generic LGA-16 3x3 P0.5; verify pad map vs Memsic DS.
Standard SOT-23-6. Variant A1 default addr 0x35 VERIFY.

REAL 142-ball map from DS14791 Rev 9 Table 18 p88-112 (VFBGA142 column; cross-checked vs Fig 7 ballout p87); body 8x8, e=0.5, 15x15 grid A-R x 1-15, ball 0.31 typ (Fig 67/Table 128 p235-236); NSMD land O0.27. AN5967 land/via-in-pad guidance not staged -- overlay-verify at H3 fanout. Placeholder 12x12 numeric grid DELETED; interrogator_v1.kicad_pcb is stale until the H3 rebuild.
BGA-24 6x4@1.0 numeric placeholder (part selection still open).

REAL 39-pad map + land pattern from EZ-DS-BL54L15 v1.9: Table 1 p10-13 (pin map, GND pads 1/16/27/39, VDD_nRF 26), Fig 11 p25 (pads 0.45x0.60 @0.75, spans 11.25/7.50/8.25). ANTENNA KEEP-OUT 5.0x8.5 at pin-1 end + >=15mm beyond both board edges, no copper any layer (p25 + s7.3.1 p21); module must sit on host-PCB edge -> ECO-H3 floorplan corner note.
VERIFIED-DS esp32-c6-mini-1 DS v1.5 p10-11 Table 3-1: SDIO map GPIO18=CMD/19=CLK/20-23=DATA0-3 and TXD0=31/RXD0=30 confirmed exactly as wired; module pad map matches espressif footprint.
Generic LGA-28 5.2x3.8 matches BNO08x package class — verify pad map vs CEVA DS.
Mapped to official generic QFN-20 3x3 P0.4; TI package code (RTE?) still unconfirmed — VERIFY vs TI DS.
PIN diode official; charge-amp (MSOP-8 TO-GENERATE) + comparator SOT-23-5 official; shield can TO-GENERATE.
Official Knowles LGA-5; confirm exact mic P/N at BOM freeze; port hole in landing flat.

Cell: REAL drawing DS-0138 Issue 3 p1 — O20 can, 3x O1.55 pins on 13.5 PCD (old 9mm PCD was wrong); drill 1.7 for PSB socket receptacles (p3 note 1: DO NOT SOLDER pins — socket-mount only, field-replaceable R2). DS pin-face drawing is a bottom view — mirrored for top-view footprint (WE top, RE lower-right, CE lower-left). ECO-H3: pad ring exceeds the ratified 14x14 envelope — zone repack. AFE: LMP91000 on official WSON-14 4x4 (harvested), pin map verified SNAS506I p3.
VERIFIED-DS 002-25383 p5-6/p20: QFN-24 4x4 P0.5 matches; DS EP is 2.75 typ (2.65 min) vs footprint 2.6 — slightly small, acceptable, note for H3. Straps corrected to VDDD dividers (Tables 2-4 p8).

VERIFIED-DS SLUSEG2D p5/p85-86: package is WQFN-18 RYK 2.5x3.0 (old WQFN-16 RTE 3x3 was the WRONG package). HR land pattern approximated to rectangles from 4226526/A — overlay-verify before fab. Addr 0x6B confirmed.

VERIFIED-DS SLUSEB5B p3 Fig 4-1: ball map A1 GPOUT..C3 BAT matches official DSBGA-9 footprint; symbol remapped to real balls. HIGH-side internal 7mOhm (BAT->SRX) — circuit topology fixed (PACKP/VBAT split, VDD=LDO out, BIN 10k pulldown). Addr 0x55 (p16).
VERIFIED-DS SLVSEC6D p4-5: DLC SON-8 1.5x2.0 P0.5 (SOT-583 land compatible — overlay-check at H3). Symbol remapped to real pins; VSET 267k (3.3V, Table 1 p22) + STOP added to circuit.
Official SOT-583-8; second instance U_SYS3V3 is a stage-1 add — components.json update needed.
VERIFIED-DS SLVSD89B p3: SOT23-5 1 EN/2 GND/3 SW/4 VIN/5 FB — symbol pin order fixed (3/4/5 were wrong).
VERIFIED-DS bq2970_family p3: DSE WSON-6 1 NC/2 COUT/3 DOUT/4 VSS/5 BAT/6 V- — symbol remapped; 330R VDD RC confirmed (p14).

parts.verify_notes: VERIFIED-DS SLVSDO5F p3: YFP WCSP-4 0.78x0.78 @0.4, balls A1 VOUT/A2 VIN/B1 GND/B2 ON — footprint renamed to real ball names, symbol remapped.

VERIFIED-DS IQS7222A v1.7 p6: QFN20 3x3 P0.4 matches official footprint; symbol remapped to real pins; addr 0x44 = order code 001 (102 would be 0x57). Only 9 sensor pins — 12-electrode flex flagged ECO-H3.
VERIFIED-DS SLOS854D p5: DGS VSSOP-10 pin map; symbol remapped, REG 1uF added, pin 6 VDD/NC tied to VDD.

VERIFIED-DS UBX-22015849 p9/p19 + IM UBX-21028173 p83: M-LGA53 53x O0.27 pads @0.5 sparse 9x9 (named A1..J9), land 1:1 copper/mask 0.37 — castellated 20-pad placeholder replaced. V_IO supply pin added to circuit; keep RF corner (B9) quiet.
